channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A rare cancer-fighting plant compound has been decoded
item.description: Scientists at UBC Okanagan have uncovered how plants produce mitraphylline, a rare natural compound with promising anti cancer potential. The team ide...

item.title: New drugs could wipe out the “zombie cells” linked to cancer and aging
item.description: Researchers found a new way to kill harmful “zombie” cells that linger after chemotherapy and help cancers become more aggressive. These senescent cel...

item.title: Scientists make old blood stem cells young again in major anti-aging breakthrough
item.description: As blood stem cells age, their lysosomes become overactive and damaged, triggering inflammation and weakening the body’s ability to regenerate healthy...

item.title: Scientists discover a weak spot shared by polio and common cold viruses
item.description: Scientists at the University of Maryland, Baltimore County, have uncovered a crucial trick used by enteroviruses—the group behind diseases like polio,...
